options.name: <blackBoxCellName>
options.description: name of the blackbox or blackblob cell

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the cell

options.name: -inputPin
options.description: Specifies the input or inout pin of the cell

options.name: -lib
options.description: Specifies the name of the timing library

options.name: -outputCap
options.description: Creates timing arcs even if they are not defined in the timing library

options.name: -outputPin
options.description: Specifies the output or inout pin of the library

options.name: -port
options.description: Specifies the name of the output port

options.name: -slew
options.description: Specifies the slew at the input of the driver cell
